title: Bottom Sheet IA · Sunset Coral
summary: Persistent bottom sheet replaces the side pane. Iframe takes the top 60 percent, sheet 40 percent (draggable to 75 percent). Rail rotates into a thin top-edge tab strip with handle.
visualIdiom: sunset coral (peach, coral, warm sand, navy ink)
flow: The bottom sheet IS the pane. Five tabs live in the top-edge strip (Sites, Settings, Files, Blueprint, Runtime), with Runtime grouping Database + Logs as two sub-tabs. A 40px drag handle hints the sheet can be pulled up to 75 percent.
